children.text: Slack is a messaging app for groups of people who work together. You can send updates, share files, and organize conversations so that everyone is in the loop.
Tap the top left icon to access your Channels and Direct Messages

Channels are chat rooms based around a project, a topic, or a team of co-workers such as “sales” or “music”. Channels can be public or private.

Direct Messages are private conversations between you and your co-workers. These messages can be 1-to-1, or include up to 8 people.
Here you’ll find a list of all your recent mentions in Slack.
